calendar.matters:
Petn. For Removal Of Trustee & Object. To Accnt.
Off Calendar Nov-06-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Armon Cooper (Counsel for Shriners' Hospital for Children); Stephen Gould (Counsel for Wells Fargo Bank, Trustee).

After some discussion with respect to an ostensibly erroneous tentative ruling and brief discussion concerning the merits of the Petition, the Court did not find compelling evidence to support removal of the Trustee and denied the Petition, Mr. Gould to prepare the Order.

Judicial Office: Herbert Donaldson, Judge; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722 ; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

Petn. For Removal Of Trustee & Object. To Accnt.
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Continued To Nov-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. For Removal Of Trustee & Object. To Accnt.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Continued To Oct-16-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. For Removal Of Trustee & Object. To Accnt.
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Continued To Sep-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Armon Cooper appearing for petitioner Shriners Hospital for Children. Counsel informs the court that counsel for Wells Fargo Bank who has not appear in this case is requesting for a continuance. Matter is continued to 9/18. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.
